creator: freebsd@marino.st
text:
distfile was rerolled:

=> Attempting to fetch http://www.ldraw.org/library/updates/complete.zip
fetch: http://www.ldraw.org/library/updates/complete.zip: size mismatch: expected 21433103, actual 22915441
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ldraw/complete.zip
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ldraw/complete.zip: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this

Fix: 

verify distfile was rerolled by upstream, regenerate distinfo, verify new distfile builds.
